# PR Size Exclusions — Files/patterns excluded from diff-line count
#
# Format: one glob pattern per line (relative to repo root)
# Matches use gitignore-style patterns

# Documentation and markdown
docs/**
*.md
CHANGELOG*
LICENSE
README*

# Git and repository metadata
.gitignore
.gitattributes
.git

# Config files (non-critical)
.editorconfig
.prettier*
.eslintignore

# Lock files (generated, high churn, no code review value)
package-lock.json
pnpm-lock.yaml
yarn.lock

# Build and distribution artifacts (generated)
packages/*/dist/**
apps/*/dist/**
.next/
.nuxt/
dist/
build/
*.tsbuildinfo

# Test and coverage artifacts (generated)
packages/*/coverage/**
apps/*/coverage/**
.nyc_output/
coverage/
*.lcov

# IDE and editor metadata
.vscode/**
.idea/**
*.swp
*.swo
*~
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Video render artifacts (generated from video-studio)
apps/video-studio/**/*.mp4
apps/video-studio/**/*.webm

# Python cache (from scripts)
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.egg-info/

# Node cache
node_modules/
.npm/

# Environment and secrets (local only, never committed)
.env*
.dev.vars*
*.secret

# Auto-generated Sentry files
.sentry-release

# Storybook static output
storybook-static/

# Git worktrees (local only, never committed)
.claude/worktrees/
